testcase.classname: PerformanceMonitor should measure request duration and log when >500ms

testcase.classname: PerformanceMonitor should log slow requests (>1000ms) with SLOW prefix

testcase.classname: PushService sendPush should send push to Expo API

testcase.classname: PushService sendPush should handle empty token arrays gracefully

testcase.classname: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException when user is not found
